use_cases: Display animated loading state during data fetching operations
Show visual feedback while waiting for API responses
Animated loading indicator for dashboard interfaces
Skeleton loading animation for content-heavy pages
ai_summary: A visually striking liquid loader featuring seven gradient-colored bars that animate with wave-like motion. The bars use sinusoidal math combined with bounce and ripple effects to create a realistic liquid physics appearance, with droplet animations appearing at wave peaks. Perfect for adding engaging loading feedback to SaaS dashboards, media applications, or any interface requiring visual state indication.
